MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-16-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-16-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up. Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Gerald J. Beaudoin, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Custom Commercial Dry Cleaners, Inc. dba FRSTeam by Custom Commercial; SCIENTIFIC ENVIRONMENTAL SOLUTIONS, INC. dba Servpro of the Sunset.
Danielle N. Nash, Esq., appearing for Defendant Jose Hernandez.
Witnesses Ceilidh Hill and Sandra Watts for Plaintiff sworn and examined.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

Counsel enters into record Stipulation for Entry of Judgment against Defendant Jose Hernandez.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Capital One Bank and against Defendant Gawzia I. Indrawes as follows:
Principal $33,163.00
Pre-Judgment Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $0
Total Judgment in the amount of $33,163.00

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2015 Set For Trial On Nov-16-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
